headline: Morgan Stanley and Bernstein Positive on Western Digital (WDC)
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the 10 Best Performing Blue Chip Stocks to Buy. headline: Stocks to Watch Recap: Disney, Constellation, Micron
summary: ? Micron Technology (MU): The memory-chip maker’s stock has been on volatile ride with the broader market, slumping premarket and then turning positive to close up 3.6%. Investors have watched for the Middle East cease-fire to unlock supplies of helium, which is key to chip production.

headline: SanDisk Pops 4% as AI Demand and NAND Price Tailwinds Keep the Memory Chip Sector Hot
summary: SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) shares are up 4% in early trading Thursday, continuing a remarkable run in the memory chip sector. This follows yesterday’s 9.86% single-day gain, which carried the stock from $710.80 to $780.90. SanDisk stock is up 2,314% over the past year, climbing from $32.35 to $815. A stock that’s expanded more than 23 times ... SanDisk Pops 4% as AI Demand and NAND Price Tailwinds Keep the Memory Chip Sector Hot

headline: Stocks to Watch: Disney, Constellation, Micron
summary: ↘️ Micron Technology (MU): The memory-chip maker’s stock slumped more than 2.5% premarket, putting it on track to unwind some of the 7.7% gain it logged yesterday amid hopes that the Middle East cease-fire would unlock supplies of helium, which is key to chip production.

headline: Western Digital Taps Open Source Quantum Error Correction For Future Storage
summary: Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) announced an alliance with Open Quantum Design and QuScript to develop open source quantum error correction technology. The collaboration focuses on applying Western Digital's data reliability expertise to quantum computing error correction and shared industry standards. The project targets long term applications for quantum computing and broader data infrastructure, beyond current AI focused headlines. Western Digital, known for its storage devices and data...
